title: Senior Platform Engineer
must_have_requirements: Design and operate reliable internal platforms for software delivery.
Improve developer productivity through build, deployment, and observability tooling.
Partner with product and infrastructure teams on resilient service architecture.
Demonstrated strength in Python-based automation and cloud-native operations.
nice_to_have_requirements: Experience leading migration efforts from monoliths to service-oriented platforms.
Comfort mentoring engineers on operational excellence and release hygiene.
Background in regulated or scientifically rigorous environments.
original_text: Northstar Systems is hiring a Senior Platform Engineer to improve developer productivity and service reliability across a cloud-native product portfolio. The role owns internal platform automation, CI/CD, Kubernetes operations, observability, and infrastructure as code. Candidates should bring strong Python experience, practical AWS operations, and a track record of building resilient systems that help engineering teams ship safely and quickly.
